zh-CN.title: 初探Flutter的外貌和特征
zh-CN.description: Flutter 基础概览：UI 架构、状态管理与工具链实践，入门与常见坑位。
zh-CN.content:
背景

Flutter 是谷歌的移动UI框架，可以快速在iOS和Android上构建高质量的原生用户界面。语言是用Dart编写。

UI

UI层上，以Flutter 框架封装一层自己的UI结构，单个View成为Widget，View以状态为区分，分为stateless和stateful。

框架

Flutter的框架，官方给了一些设计方案，与Flutter 的背景，整个框架基于状态模式，state management，按照Flutter 提到的，分为短暂状态 ephemeral state 和app 状态，简单说，Flutter 的业务状态，如用户点击按钮更新逻辑和UI； app 自身状态，如app收到消息通知。

发现一个有趣的讨论点，讨论状态设计。如

When asked about React’s setState versus Redux’s store, the author of Redux, Dan Abramov, replied:

“The rule of thumb is: Do whatever is less awkward.”

原文

为了能够简单入手，官方推荐了一些Flutter 开发的优秀框架的设计实现和案例分享，传送门。

本地化

本地化，这个比较简单，Flutter 封装的一套工具类，和现在NSLocalization差不多的适用方式。

Tools & Debug

Flutter 的开发环境是另外一套环境，IDE，VS（VS code）， AS（Android Studio）可以安装对应的plug。

Debug，分为命令行和自定义。

命令行通过安装Dart Command Line 进行调试。
自定，现在是可以支持在Android Studio 上调试，而iOS 现在还不支持在Xcode 等一系列Apple 的工具进行调试。

视图界面，现在有的是基于浏览器方式；代码扫描，依赖Drat的扫描工具。整体看没有集成在一个统一环境中，前期存在一定的陡峭学习阶段。也许开发中的异常环境，可能就导致开发者折腾大半天的时间。有待改善。

结尾

总的来说，Flutter 是一个全新的平台（Web， Native之外），基于底层的图像引擎Skia做渲染交互，涉及到系统核心模块，通过互通的Native API调用。可以看到开发环境还存在很多改进的路要做，相对原始开发而言，完整的工具链，三方库，都是强大的优势。但是，Flutter 这一套设计方案，google 其实也同样在另外一个操作系统Fuchsia使用，而底层的Skia 引擎也应用在大家熟知的浏览器Chrome中。未来是Google的 “Web“ 一统江湖的平台吗？

更新

Flutter 在Android中至少要增加6.3MB 的包大小，在iOS中支持要增加14MB 左右。另外Flutter 由于使用独立的渲染引擎，目前内存占用的情况不是很理想，在iOS build 的版本中内存在100MB 左右，并且是单例模式，即使做了页面关闭之后没有去释放内存，对App 的性能，稳定性，体积，开发环境，都存在不足。

en.title: A First Look at Flutter's Appearance and Features
en.description: Flutter Basics Overview: UI Architecture, State Management, and Toolchain Practices, Getting Started and Common Pitfalls.
en.content:
background

Flutter is Google's mobile UI framework that enables the rapid creation of high-quality native user interfaces on iOS and Android. It is written in Dart.

UI

On the UI layer, a custom UI structure is encapsulated using the Flutter framework. Individual Views become Widgets, and Views are distinguished by their state, being either stateless or stateful.

frame

The Flutter framework, according to official documentation, provides some design solutions. In line with Flutter's background, the entire framework is based on the state pattern and state management. As mentioned in Flutter, it is divided into ephemeral state and app state. Simply put, Flutter's business state, such as the logic and UI updated when the user clicks a button; and the app's own state, such as when the app receives a message notification.

An interesting point of discussion has emerged: the design of states. For example...

When asked about React’s setState versus Redux’s store, the author of Redux, Dan Abramov, replied:

“The rule of thumb is: Do whatever is less awkward.”

original

To make it easy to get started, the official documentation recommends some excellent framework designs and implementation examples for Flutter development.Portal。

Localization

Localization is relatively simple; Flutter provides a set of utility classes, similar to the current NSLocalization approach.

Tools & Debug

Flutter uses a separate development environment, such as an IDE, Visual Studio (VS Code), or Android Studio (AS), where you can install the corresponding plug-ins.

Debugging can be divided into command-line and custom methods.

Command-line debugging is performed by installing Dart Command Line.
Custom debugging is now supported in Android Studio, but iOS does not yet support debugging in Apple's tools such as Xcode.

The user interface is currently browser-based; code scanning relies on Drat's scanning tools. Overall, it's not integrated into a unified environment, resulting in a steep learning curve in the early stages. Unexpected development situations could potentially cause developers to spend a significant portion of their time troubleshooting. This needs improvement.

End

In summary, Flutter is a completely new platform (beyond Web and Native), based on an underlying graphics engine.SkiingRendering and interaction involve core system modules, relying on interoperable native API calls. It's clear that the development environment still has much room for improvement. Compared to traditional development, a complete toolchain and third-party libraries offer significant advantages. However, Google also uses the same Flutter design in its Fuchsia operating system, and the underlying Skia engine is used in the well-known Chrome browser. Will Google's "Web" platform dominate the future?

renew

Flutter requires at least a 6.3MB increase in package size on Android and around 14MB on iOS. Furthermore, due to its independent rendering engine, Flutter's memory usage is currently less than ideal, averaging around 100MB in iOS builds, even with a singleton pattern. This lack of memory release after page closure negatively impacts app performance, stability, size, and development environment.
